query:
SELECT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM public.email_threads t
                JOIN public.email_links l ON l.id = t.link_id
                WHERE t.id = $1::uuid
                  AND (
                      l.macro_id = $2
                      OR EXISTS (
                          SELECT 1
                          FROM public.macro_user_links mul
                          WHERE mul.child_macro_id = l.macro_id
                            AND mul.primary_macro_id = $2
                      )
                  )
            ) AS "exists!"
